label: Ignition OFF
description: Sets the ignition line OFF via your power script (needs script_path on the power device config; uses --ignition off).

label: Ignition LOCK
description: Sets the ignition to LOCK via your power script (--ignition lock).

label: Ignition ON
description: Sets the ignition ON (run position) via your power script (--ignition on).

label: Ignition ACCESSORY
description: Sets the ignition to ACCESSORY via your power script (--ignition accessory).

label: Ignition START (crank)
description: Pulses the ignition START/crank position via your power script (--ignition start).
